name: Masked HERO Furnace
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｍ・ＨＥＲＯ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>マスクドヒーロー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ファーネス
desc: You can reveal this card in your hand; add 1 "Mask Change" or "Polymerization" from your Deck to your hand, then discard 1 card. You cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck the turn you activate this effect, except "HERO" monsters. If you Special Summon a non-FIRE "HERO" Fusion Monster(s) (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your GY (if it was there when the Summon resolved), or hand (even if not), but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use each effect of "Masked HERO Furnace" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can reveal this card in your hand; add 1 "Mask Change" or "Polymerization" from your Deck to your hand, then discard 1 card. You cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck the turn you activate this effect, except "HERO" monsters. If you Special Summon a non-FIRE "HERO" Fusion Monster(s) (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your GY (if it was there when the Summon resolved), or hand (even if not), but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use each effect of "Masked HERO Furnace" once per turn.
eff: You can reveal this card in your hand; add 1 "Mask Change" or "Polymerization" from your Deck to your hand, then discard 1 card. You cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck the turn you activate this effect, except "HERO" monsters. If you Special Summon a non-FIRE "HERO" Fusion Monster(s) (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your GY (if it was there when the Summon resolved), or hand (even if not), but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use each effect of "Masked HERO Furnace" once per turn.

jp_sets.set: Tactical-Try Pack: Dark Magic / HERO / Mikanko

action: Reveals itself in the hand for cost
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
Restricts the player's Special Summons to archetype specific monsters
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
Special Summons itself from your hand
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
